selection_policy: PC is a hard stand-alone plastic-energy veto and is never a BGO classifier input. The 0.5 MeV screening point ranks designs by pi0 veto conditional on the fixed BGO Nclus=1 selection; the full thesis-like pre-PC conditional value is reported separately and is not optimized because its 100k denominator can be small.

kamada_pc.caveat: Kamada section 3.4 and summary disagree on the Pb thickness assigned to the two-layer 64% point

pc_response_scope.measured_here: effective PC-only veto including geometric acceptance and plastic energy deposit
pc_response_scope.not_separated_in_current_root: gamma intersection with the first PC layer versus intrinsic detection conditional on intersection

fixed_detector_definitions.bgo: Nclus4 == 1; per-segment BGO threshold fixed at 3 MeV
fixed_detector_definitions.th: require valid target-to-leading-BGO geometric path, 0.7<=total dE<=3.0 MeV and 0.12<=dE/dx<=0.25 MeV/mm
fixed_detector_definitions.tlc: any of 30 segments Npe>=1 at collection*PDE=5%; provisional optical-response point
fixed_detector_definitions.delta_z: require valid TH z readout and abs(zReco-zPred)<90 mm
